title: Maigret à Pigalle
writer: Sergio Amidei, Mario Landi, Georges Simenon
actors: Gino Cervi, Lila Kedrova, Raymond Pellegrin
plot: Maigret is called in to solve a crime in a night-club, and he has a field day dealing with tough characters, and beautiful bar-flies. The plot is based on Georges Simenon's novel, "Maigret au Picratt's".
